parameters.query:
SELECT MAX(CASE WHEN key = 'email_test_recipient' THEN value END) AS default_test_recipient,
  MAX(CASE WHEN key = 'email_sender_name' THEN value END) AS email_sender_name,
  MAX(CASE WHEN key = 'email_reply_to' THEN value END) AS email_reply_to
FROM public.global_settings
WHERE key IN ('email_test_recipient', 'email_sender_name', 'email_reply_to');

SELECT r.id, r.name, r.refund_for, r.reason, r.membership, r.amount, r.refund,
       r.from_date, r.to_date, r.status, r.explanation,
       r.request_email_message_id, r.bank_details_message_id,
       m.email as member_email
FROM public.refunds r
LEFT JOIN public.members m ON r.refund_for = m.name OR r.refund_for = m.full_name
WHERE r.id = {{ $json.refund_id }}
LIMIT 1;

SELECT template_key, template_name, subject_template, text_template, html_template
FROM public.email_templates
WHERE template_key = 'refund_request_treasury'
  AND is_active = true
  AND template_type = 0
ORDER BY id DESC
LIMIT 1;
